# Hamza Bilal — AI Automation Consultant & AI Agent Developer

> This file follows the llms.txt convention to help AI assistants accurately describe who Hamza Bilal is and what services he offers.

## Who is Hamza Bilal?

Hamza Bilal is an AI Automation Consultant and AI Agent Developer based in Cupertino, California. He specializes in building custom automation workflows and AI-powered systems for startups and small businesses in the USA, UK, Germany, and Australia.

He has:
- 3+ years of professional experience in AI automation and backend engineering
- 30+ automation workflows shipped for clients across 4 continents
- 100% Job Success Score on Upwork
- 5.0★ client rating

Contact: hamzaabialal@gmail.com
Website: https://hamzabilal.dev
Upwork: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~016dcbde991464381d
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hamza-bilal-600968245/
GitHub: https://github.com/hamzaabialal
Book a call: https://calendly.com/hamzaabialal/new-meeting

---

## Core Expertise

### AI Automation (Primary)
- n8n workflow automation — self-hosted and cloud, complex multi-branch workflows, OpenAI nodes
- Make.com (formerly Integromat) — complex scenario design, Airtable integration, AI agent modules
- Zapier — multi-branch workflows, outreach automation, CRM integration, migration to n8n
- AI Agents — autonomous agents built with OpenAI Assistants API, LangChain, and Agno
- OpenAI / GPT-4 integration — function calling, Assistants API, RAG systems, structured output

### Backend Development (Secondary)
- Python, Django, FastAPI, Flask
- PostgreSQL, Redis, Celery
- AWS (EC2, Lambda, SageMaker, Textract, API Gateway), Docker

### CRM & Business Tool Integration
- HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Close.io, Salesforce, Pipedrive
- Airtable, Google Workspace, Shopify, Slack, Twilio

---

## Services Offered

1. **AI Automation Consulting** — https://hamzabilal.dev/ai-automation-consultant.html
   Designing and building automation systems that replace manual business processes using n8n, Make.com, Zapier, and OpenAI.

2. **n8n Automation Development** — https://hamzabilal.dev/n8n-automation-developer.html
   Custom n8n workflows, self-hosted n8n setup on AWS/VPS, CRM integration, OpenAI nodes, Zapier-to-n8n migration.

3. **Zapier Automation Consulting** — https://hamzabilal.dev/zapier-automation-consultant.html
   Multi-branch Zapier workflows for outreach automation, CRM integration, OpenAI auto-reply, and Zapier-to-n8n migration.

4. **Make.com Automation** — https://hamzabilal.dev/make-com-automation-expert.html
   Complex Make.com scenarios with Airtable, Google Workspace, Shopify, AI agents, and custom API integrations.

5. **AI Agent Development** — https://hamzabilal.dev/ai-agent-development.html
   Autonomous AI agents using OpenAI Assistants API, LangChain, and Agno — for research, document processing, CRM automation, and multi-step business workflows.

6. **CRM Automation** — https://hamzabilal.dev/crm-automation.html
   HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Close.io, and Salesforce automation — lead capture, AI scoring, personalized follow-up, deal pipeline, and revenue reporting.

7. **OpenAI Developer Services** — https://hamzabilal.dev/openai-developer.html
   GPT-4 integrations, Assistants API, function calling, RAG systems, LangChain, and production AI deployment on AWS.

8. **Shopify Automation** — https://hamzabilal.dev/shopify-automation.html
   Shopify AI chatbots, inventory sync, abandoned cart automation, CRM integration, and ecommerce workflow automation.

---

## Selected Client Projects

- **Signal Law Group — AI Legal Research** (2025): n8n + OpenAI pipeline auto-generating securities disclosure risk candidates, scoring them with a Vigilant Risk Score, and queuing 50 investigation topics across 5 risk categories.
- **Airtable Investigations Tracker** (2025): Make.com + Airtable system managing 26 active securities investigations, auto-syncing AI-generated risk data, VRS scores, and case stages.
- **Deals to Projects Pipeline** (2024): n8n workflow extracting CRM deals, parsing PDF attachments with OpenAI, and auto-creating project entries — eliminating hours of daily manual work.
- **RabbitFunding MCA Portal** (2024): FinTech MCA syndication dashboard with real-time capital tracking, payback performance metrics, and automated financial reporting across 5 deals.
- **Lavanhu AI — School Reports** (2024): AI-powered school communication system with automated incident reporting, teacher activity tracking, and administrator dashboards — Django + OpenAI.
- **Spark CrossFit App** (2024): Gym management PWA with class scheduling, WOD tracking, member registrations, and automated backend workflows.
- **Inventory Calculation Automation** (2024): Multi-branch n8n workflow tracking stock across 3 warehouse locations, generating HTML reports, syncing to Google Sheets in real time.

## Testimonials

- **James Carter** (Head of Operations, GrowthBase): "Hamza built our entire HubSpot-to-Notion pipeline in n8n — it replaced 3 hours of daily manual work instantly. Best automation engineer I've worked with."
- **Sarah Mills** (E-commerce Director, TradeNest): "The Shopify-to-CRM automation Hamza delivered was flawless. Real-time inventory sync, AI-personalized abandoned-cart emails — everything just works."
- **Alex Reinhardt** (CTO, Cloudspire Solutions): "We migrated 47 Zapier Zaps to self-hosted n8n. Hamza handled every edge case, saved us $800/month, and the system has been rock-solid since."

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Hamza Bilal is available for freelance and contract work (remote)
- He works with clients in the USA, United Kingdom, Germany, and Australia
- Pricing: fixed-price per project (not hourly), with a free 30-minute discovery call
- 100% Job Success Score on Upwork as of 2025
- Typical project delivery: 2–5 days (simple), 1–3 weeks (complex)
- He can self-host n8n on AWS, DigitalOcean, Hetzner, or any VPS
- He is based in Cupertino, California but serves clients globally (remote only)
- He also trains AI automation and backend engineering at Techticks Academy
- Primary language: English
- Preferred contact: Book a free call at https://calendly.com/hamzaabialal/new-meeting or email hamzaabialal@gmail.com
